### About Anceita Clinic

# Best Dermatologist In Hyderabad

Anceita is a Dermatology and Aesthetic clinic located in the suburbs of Hyderabad at Jubilee Hills. At Anceita, we offer unmatched clinical excellence with best-in-class aesthetic services encompassing diagnosis and therapy of complete range of dermatology treatments for skin and hair. We provide cutting-edge technology, USFDA approved equipment and infrastructure to provide world-class services. Our team of expert dermatologists helps you reach the epitome of aesthetic wellness with a synergistic combination of hands-on experience and skill. Our services adhere to high ethical standards ensuring that our services are customized to fit our client’s needs. We strive to continually improve client satisfaction with research-backed treatment procedures.

Our Doctors

# Dr. Shravya Gurnurkar

We are proud to have the opportunity to give you the smile of your dreams.

We are proud to house a team of specialists who share the same vision and belief in holistic solutions to empower every client with flawless skin and good hair days. Dr. Shravya G is our senior Dermatologist and Trichologist, specializing in cosmetic dermatology and hair loss treatments.

She is one of the few injectors to be invited for an international workshop early this year. Dr. Shravya G offers personalized touch in her services that get translated into long-standing and assured results for clients.

[Know More](https://anceitaclinic.com/dr-shravya-gurnurkar)

![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/doctor-img3.jpg)

![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Dr-Kavya-Reddy.jpg)

Our Doctors

# Dr. Kavya Reddy

Dr. Kavya Reddy, is a board-certified dermatologist with a deep passion for helping people feel confident and comfortable in their own skin.

Her journey in dermatology has been shaped by a strong foundation in clinical dermatology, paired with a keen interest in aesthetic medicine and evidence-based skin and hair care.

Over the years, she has had the privilege of treating a diverse range of patients and witnessing how the right treatment can not only heal skin but uplift confidence and improve quality of life. She is always updated with the latest advancements and techniques in dermatology and cosmetology to ensure her patients receive the most effective and safe care.

Her practice philosophy is simple: to treat with empathy, listen with patience, and deliver results with precision.

Our Doctors

# Dr. Yaswanthi Reddy

Dr. Yaswanthi Reddy is a skilled dermatologist with over 5 years of experience in treating a wide range of skin, hair, and nail conditions.

She specializes in both medical and cosmetic dermatology, offering personalized care for every patient.

Her approach combines advanced technology with evidence-based treatments for optimal results.

Committed to healthy skin for all ages as she ensures tailored care.

Your skin health is her priority, with advanced and compassionate treatment.

Experience professional medical care for healthier, radiant skin.

![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Dr-Yeshwanti.jpg)

# Our Skin & Hair Services

Anceita is a multi-specialty clinic located in the suburbs of Hyderabad at Jubilee Hills. At Anceita, we offer unmatched clinical excellence with best-in-class aesthetic services.

[![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/service-6.jpg)](https://anceitaclinic.com/book-an-appointment/) Anti-Aging Treatment

[![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/more.jpg)](https://anceitaclinic.com/services/) More Services

### Why Choose Us For Skin & Hair Treatments In Hyderabad

##### What Makes Ancieta As The Best Skin & Hair Clinic In Hyderabad

![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/dermatology-3.png) High Ethical Standards

We adhere to high ethical standards by always putting the client’s interest first and listen to their concern carefully. A detailed consultation is provided to the clients with thorough knowledge about the treatment process.

![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/value-1-1.png) Result-oriented Solutions

We follow evidence-based medicine and standard protocols and aspire to be a brand known for result-oriented cosmetic solutions.

![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/beauty-1.png) Advanced technology

We employ the most advanced technological solutions duly certified by USFDA to offer trusted wellness solutions while maintaining safety and efficacy.

![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/hospital-1.png) Genuine, Scientific Results

We are known for our genuine and proven treatment options that are based on our firm belief in holistic health

![](https://cdn-ikpjibd.nitrocdn.com/KXeqtCkTmRjQLdrcKTQmspmeFtuvhxeO/assets/images/optimized/rev-fdd45bc/anceitaclinic.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/hospital-1.png) Accessible & Affordable

Our services are accessible to every man and woman at an affordable price with no compromise on quality whatsoever.

# Frequently Asked Questions

How Many Sessions Are Required?

Depending on the type and extent of your acne scar problem, the number of sessions for each type of treatment is recommended. This can range from four sessions to even eight sessions.

What's The Cost Of Acne Scar Removal?

The cost of acne scar treatment in Hyderabad can start at Rs.5,500 per session. Since these treatments are priced differently and a combination of treatments might be recommended, this value is very subjective to each case.

How Many Sessions Are Required?

Depending on the type and extent of your acne scar problem, the number of sessions for each type of treatment is recommended. This can range from four sessions to even eight sessions.

What's The Downtime Of This Treatment?

The downtime is different for different procedures. It can range from no downtime to a few days of skin peeling and redness after the procedure.

What Are The Side Effects Of This Treatment?

One can observe slight redness and mild swelling post the treatment. However, these effects do not last more than a few minutes or maximum up to a day or two. For extreme uneasiness, the doctor may prescribe a soothing cream or lotion. Within a span of a week, the older skin peels off revealing the new, fresh, and glowing skin.

title: Anceita Skin & Hair Clinic In Jubilee Hills - Best Dermatologist For Laser, Acne, Scar, Hair Loss Treatments
description: Anceita skin and hair clinic offers a wide range of services for healthy hair and beautiful skin. Our specialist team will give you the result oriented treatments for all kinds pimples, acne scars, hair loss, and other skin & hair related concerns with US-FDA approved equipment.
